evals.prompt: Review the evals for .codex/skills/yuuzu-ide-tauri-debug-smoke and tell me which testing methods should be optimized before we run them.
evals.expected_output: A feedback report that checks coverage, speed, reliability, evidence quality, and safety, with concrete changes to the eval prompts or expectations.
expectations: Uses the eval feedback rubric rather than only summarizing the skill.
Identifies runtime smoke steps that are necessary versus overbroad.
Flags permission-dependent Browser capture as blocked/incomplete when permission is missing.
Suggests at least one concrete optimization to improve speed or reliability.

evals.prompt: Set up the next iteration plan for benchmarking yuuzu-ide-verification-planner, but do not launch subagents unless I explicitly ask.
evals.expected_output: A benchmark setup plan that validates eval files, names with-skill and baseline outputs, explains what feedback will be collected, and stops before spawning agents.
expectations: Does not spawn or assume subagents without explicit user approval.
Defines with-skill and baseline comparison outputs.
Includes static validation of frontmatter and eval JSON before execution.
Explains what feedback fields will be used to improve the skill.
